---
title: "antigravity_bridge.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/cstar/core/antigravity_bridge.py"
loc: 141
complexity: 19
logic_score: 0.50
style_score: 3.72
intel_score: 5.37
overall_score: 2.86
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating clean_cli_output, AntigravityBridge.

## Interaction Protocol
Import clean_cli_output and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 102 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [json](file://json)
- [logging](file://logging)
- [os](file://os)
- [uuid](file://uuid)
- [re](file://re)
- [tempfile](file://tempfile)
- [logging.handlers](file://logging.handlers)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [sys](file://sys)

### Exports
- `clean_cli_output`
- `AntigravityBridge`
- `clean_cli_output`
- `_fast_path_intelligence`
- `process_request`
- `process_request_with_retry`
- `handle_client`
- `main`
